name: Visions in Air
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Gifts From the Sky
granted_abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model resolves a Walk action, make a Scheme marker within 1" of this model.

granted_abilities.name: Chains of Air
granted_abilities.text: Reduce the Dmg of all of this model's attacks by 1.

granted_abilities.name: Throw Off Shackles
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: Card shows decorative wind swirl elements at top and ornamental divider below title
Large watermarked symbol appears in center of card
Limitations section shows single dash/hyphen, interpreted as no limitations
Card is labeled as 'Upgrade' at bottom
